ListItem.Para: Flight attendant call lights operate normally.
Alternate, normal and emergency procedures, and/or operating restrictions are established and used.

Note.Para: Any function that operates normally may be used.

OperationProcedure.Para: Prior to flight, the pilot-in-command must brief cabin crew members that PA system is inoperative. Megaphones are used by the crew members for normal and emergency announcements.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Number installed: 10 - Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871, VN-A872, VN-A873, VN-A874, VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879.
Number installed: 9 - Applicable to: VN-A865, VN-A866, VN-A869.
One or more may be inoperative provided “RETURN TO SEAT” sign in the associated lavatory is operative.

ListItem.Para: Prior to flight, the pilot-in-command must brief cabin crew members to ensure that affected lavatory must not be occupied during takeoff, landing and in turbulent weather condition.
“RETURN TO SEAT” sign will be used to alert passengers and cabin attendants when return to seat is requested.
Cabin crews knock the lavatory doors if lavatory occupied lights are on.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided inoperative speakers are not adjacent to each other.

Note.Para: Certain cabin speaker drive module faults may result in PASSENGER ADDRESS status message being displayed when the associated speakers operate normally.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Confirm inoperative cabin speakers are not adjacent (forward to aft) (AMM DDG 44-12-01).

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: No passenger seat, cabin attendant seat or crew rest area bunk may be occupied from which passenger address system is not audible and intelligible; seat must beblocked and placarded "DO NOT OCCUPY".

Note.Para: Certain cabin speaker drive module faults may result in PASSENGER ADDRESS status message being displayed when the associated speakers operate normally.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Affected seats must be blocked and placarded "DO NOT OCCUPY" (AMM DDG 44-12-01).
